command: pnpm --filter apps/chat exec playwright test e2e/chat-window-benchmark.spec.ts --reporter=json
notes: Runs against the browser dev harness and mock transport, not the VS Code Electron webview.
Budgets are catastrophic-regression caps for CI/dev stability; use measurements as the comparison baseline for future optimization work.
Heap is sampled through Chromium CDP Performance metrics after an attempted garbage collection.
